# Vendored NRPy provenance

This directory is an unmodified source snapshot of upstream NRPy, apart from
this provenance file.

- Repository: <https://github.com/nrpy/nrpy>
- Branch at selection time: `main`
- Commit: `4d16f0e35ce90a50b87508088d2dfcf744aa65b9`
- Upstream commit date: `2026-07-06T21:36:25-07:00`
- Snapshot date: `2026-07-10`
- Upstream release: `2.2026.6`

The upstream `.git/` directory is intentionally excluded. Refreshes must pin a
reviewed commit, replace the complete snapshot, update this file, and rerun the
symbolic-builder tests. Publication code must not carry local patches in this
tree; any necessary adaptation belongs in the Pinndorama solver directories.
